### exit 1
### stdout
### stderr
WARNING! stowing pkg would cause conflicts:
  * cannot stow ../stow/pkg/f over existing target f since neither a link nor a directory and --adopt not specified
All operations aborted.
### tree
dir  home
dir  stow
dir  stow/pkg
file stow/pkg/f 0644 11507a0e2f5e69d5dfa40a62a1bd7b6ee57e6bcd85c67c9b8431b36fff21c437
dir  target
file target/f 0644 cba06b5736faf67e54b07b561eae94395e774c517a7d910a54369e1263ccfbd4
### end
